name: Classic Hershey Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan or a 12-cup fluted tube pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter until creamy.
4. Gradually add granulated sugar, beating on medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Add melted Hershey's Milk Chocolate; beat until blended.
7. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; add to chocolate mixture alternately with buttermilk, beating until blended.
8. Add syrup and vanilla; beat until blended.
9. Stir in chopped pecans.
10. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan to a wire rack.
13. Allow to cool completely.
14. If desired, sift powdered sugar over the top.
